_comment_assignee_desc: ASSIGNEE NOTIFICATIONS: Gamified, second-person, encouraging tone with emojis. NO 'ChoreOps:' prefix.

chore_overdue_assignee.title: ⏰ Chore Overdue
chore_overdue_assignee.message: {chore_name} is overdue! Complete it now to earn {points} points

chore_overdue_steal_available.title: ⚡ Chore Alert
chore_overdue_steal_available.message: {chore_name} is overdue and available to steal! Complete it first to earn {points} points

chore_due_reminder_assignee.title: ⏰ Chore Reminder
chore_due_reminder_assignee.message: {chore_name} is due in {minutes} minutes! Worth {points} points

chore_due_window_assignee.title: 🎯 Chore Now Due
chore_due_window_assignee.message: {chore_name} is now due! Complete within {hours} hour(s) to earn {points} points

achievement_earned_assignee.title: 🏆 Achievement Earned!
achievement_earned_assignee.message: You earned {achievement_name}! Keep up the great work

challenge_completed_assignee.title: 🏁 Challenge Complete!
challenge_completed_assignee.message: You completed {challenge_name}! Keep up the great work

penalty_applied_assignee.title: ⚠️ Penalty Applied
penalty_applied_assignee.message: {penalty_name}: {points} points deducted. Let's get back on track!

bonus_applied_assignee.title: ⭐ Bonus Applied!
bonus_applied_assignee.message: {bonus_name}: You earned {points} bonus points! Great job

multiplier_changed_assignee.title: ⚖️ Multiplier Updated
multiplier_changed_assignee.message: Your points multiplier changed from {old_multiplier}x to {new_multiplier}x

_comment_approver_desc: APPROVER NOTIFICATIONS: Informative, third-person, actionable. Format: '{assignee_name}: Action'. NO 'ChoreOps:' prefix.

chore_reminder_approver.title: ⏰ {assignee_name}: Approval Needed
chore_reminder_approver.message: Reminder: {chore_name} claimed by {assignee_name} is waiting for your review

reward_reminder_approver.title: ⏰ {assignee_name}: Reward Pending
reward_reminder_approver.message: Reminder: {reward_name} requested by {assignee_name} is waiting for your approval

data_reset_global.title: 🔄 ChoreOps: Full Reset
data_reset_global.message: All system data has been reset to defaults

_comment_actions_desc: NOTIFICATION ACTION BUTTONS: Softer, more encouraging language
